title: Elaeocarpus calomala
taxonomy: Elaeocarpus calomala is classified under the family Elaeocarpaceae, which is a small family of flowering plants native to the tropical regions of Australia and New Guinea. The Elaeocarpaceae family is part of the order Oxalidales, which is a larger group of flowering plants. Elaeocarpus calomala specifically belongs to the genus Elaeocarpus, a genus of about 300 species of flowering plants. The Elaeocarpus genus is characterized by its showy flowers and small fruits.
